// Free Joy — auto-generated JavaScript variant (from the .tsx source).
// Do not edit by hand — run `pnpm gen:impl`.

import * as React from "react";
import { ensureKeyframes } from "../motion/keyframes";
import { useReducedMotion } from "../motion/useReducedMotion";
ensureKeyframes(
  "fj-marquee",
  `@keyframes fj-marquee {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }`
);
const FADE_MASK = "linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, black 8%, black 92%, transparent)";
export function Marquee({
  children,
  duration = 24,
  direction = "left",
  pauseOnHover = true,
  gap = 24,
  fade = true,
  disabled = false,
  style,
  ...rest
}) {
  const reduced = useReducedMotion();
  const [paused, setPaused] = React.useState(false);
  const animate = !disabled && !reduced;
  const group = (clone) => <div
    aria-hidden={clone || void 0}
    inert={clone || void 0}
    style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap, paddingRight: gap, flexShrink: 0 }}
  >
      {children}
    </div>;
  return <div
    onMouseEnter={() => pauseOnHover && setPaused(true)}
    onMouseLeave={() => pauseOnHover && setPaused(false)}
    style={{
      overflow: "hidden",
      ...fade ? { maskImage: FADE_MASK, WebkitMaskImage: FADE_MASK } : {},
      ...style
    }}
    {...rest}
  >
      <div
    style={{
      display: "flex",
      width: "max-content",
      animation: animate ? `fj-marquee ${duration}s linear infinite` : "none",
      animationDirection: direction === "right" ? "reverse" : void 0,
      animationPlayState: paused ? "paused" : void 0,
      willChange: animate ? "transform" : void 0
    }}
  >
        {group(false)}
        {animate && group(true)}
      </div>
    </div>;
}
